decision_title: Auth module shipped with zero P0 bugs.
evidence_quotes: Alex opened by confirming the auth module shipped last Friday with zero P0 bugs.

decision_title: JWT token expiry set to 24 hours.
Password reset emails are not rate-limited.
evidence_quotes: Carol flagged that password reset emails are not being rate-limited.

decision_title: Password reset rate limit is 3 attempts per hour.
evidence_quotes: Password reset rate limit: 3 per hour

decision_title: API gateway will use AWS API Gateway.
evidence_quotes: API gateway: AWS API Gateway, 100 req/min per user cap

decision_title: API gateway rate limit set to 100 requests per minute per user.
evidence_quotes: API gateway: AWS API Gateway, 100 req/min per user cap

decision_title: Mobile app team is blocked by auth API spec publication.
evidence_quotes: Alex noted the mobile app team is blocked until the auth API spec is published.

decision_title: Auth API spec target publish date is 2026-07-05.
Automated integration tests required for auth endpoints.
evidence_quotes: Carol wants all three auth endpoints (login, refresh, reset) to have automated integration tests before Sprint 3 sign-off.

decision_title: Fallback behavior if API gateway fails.
evidence_quotes: What is the fallback behaviour if the API gateway goes down?

decision_title: Refresh token invalidation upon password reset.
evidence_quotes: Are refresh tokens invalidated on password reset?
